description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fix the issue where 26.2 snapshot 1+ cannot start.  
2. Add a feature to allow switching the graphics API for 26.2+ within the launcher.  
3. Add /system_ext to fix the issue where some library files may fail to load.  
4. Fix the issue caused by glfwGetKey that prevents entering saves/worlds when using certain mods.  
5. Adjust some text descriptions for the renderer and driver.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复26.2 snapshot 1+无法启动的问题
2.新增功能允许在启动器内切换26.2+图形API
3.添加/system_ext修复部分库文件可能无法加载的问题
4.修复glfwGetKey导致的部分使用模组后无法进入存档的问题
5.调整渲染器、驱动部分文本描述
